omniProcessElements.name: Prefill Survey Questions
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "PrefillSurveryQuestions", "integrationProcedureKey" : "SiteAssessment_QuestionResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "GetPrefilledAssessmentQuestionResponses:AssessmentDataReturned:AssessmentResponse", "responseJSONNode" : "Site SFQ ver1", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Save", "remoteClass" : "discoveryfrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "Assessment.AssessmentStatus" : "Completed" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "usageType" : "HcUsageType" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: availableHours
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How many working hours per week do the research team estimate they have available for the PRISM trial? Indicate your response in Hours/ week", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Enter the estimated working hours per week.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0.0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: currentStudies
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How many studies/trials is this hospital currently recruiting from this patient population?\nTotal \"Open and enrolling\"", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Enter the total number of open and enrolling studies.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0.0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: Does_the_facility_have_experience_conducting_cancer_trials
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Does the facility have experience conducting cancer trials?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0.0, "maxLength" : 255.0, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0.0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: followUpStudies
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How many studies/trials is this hospital currently recruiting from this patient population?\nTotal in Follow-up phase:", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Enter the total number of studies in the follow-up phase.", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0.0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: piExperiencePopulati
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Does the Principal Investigator have previous experience with Study population?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Select Yes or No.", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: piExperienceResearch
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Does the Principal Investigator have previous experience with Clinical research?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Select Yes or No.", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: proceduresDocumented
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Are the procedures documented in the protocol consistent with the site's own standards of care?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : true, "helpText" : "Select Yes or No.", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "helpTextPos" : "bottom-left" }

childElements.name: Site_Feasibility_Score
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Site Feasibility Score", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "SUM(
IF(CONTAINS(%proceduresDocumented%, "Yes"),50,
IF(CONTAINS(%proceduresDocumented%, "No"), 5)),
IF(CONTAINS(%piExperienceResearch%, "Yes"),50,
IF(CONTAINS(%piExperienceResearch%, "No"), 5)),
IF(CONTAINS(%piExperiencePopulati%, "Yes"),50,
IF(CONTAINS(%piExperiencePopulati%, "No"), 5)),
IF((%currentStudies% < 5 ),50,
IF((%currentStudies% >5), 5),
IF((%followUpStudies% < 5 ), 50),
IF((%followUpStudies% > 5), 5)),
IF((%availableHours% < 5 ), 50),
IF((%availableHours% > 5), 5))
", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Number", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Site SFQ ver1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Site SFQ ver1", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Submit", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
